creator: dmk@ncf.ca
text:
Created attachment 208703
PNG of firefox showing mobileread.com forums.

I'm running Firefox (firefox-70.0_3,1) on FreeBSD 12.0-RELEASE-p10, amd64. I'm completely unsure as to why, but on most websites firefox isn't displaying checkboxes well. I've attached a screenshot to demonstrate. In the Konquereor_checkbox.png screenshot, you can clearly see the checkbox in the Login area next to the "Remember me" line. On Firefox you can't see it.

Just in case it was a plasma desktop thing, I also tried it on firefox in twm. Same results.
